task_completion.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp application window is visible on the screen.
The 'Fells Loop' item is highlighted or selected in the library/data pane within Garmin BaseCamp.

task_completion.description: Open the export dialog for the selected data
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog window is open, initiated from the File > Export menu or right-click context menu.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Documents folder in the export dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address bar or directory indicator in the export dialog shows 'Documents' or 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct filename for the exported GPX file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File name' field in the export dialog contains 'exported_fells_loop' or 'exported_fells_loop.gpx', and the 'Save as type' is set to GPX.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button in the export dialog, or a subsequent screenshot shows the newly created 'exported_fells_loop.gpx' file in the Documents folder via File Explorer.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to export the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp's menus and export dialogs, rather than using a terminal or PowerShell to copy/move files.

integrity.description: The agent performed a genuine export rather than creating a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is generated through BaseCamp's 'Save' dialog, not by opening Notepad or another text editor to manually create a file named 'exported_fells_loop.gpx'.

integrity.description: The agent exported the specific 'Fells Loop' data
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Fells Loop' data is explicitly selected before exporting, ensuring the entire collection or a different trail isn't exported by mistake.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\exported_fells_loop.gpx'. The expected filename is 'exported_fells_loop.gpx'. A genuine export of the 'Fells Loop' data from Garmin BaseCamp will naturally satisfy the minimum requirements of being >500 bytes and containing >10 data points.
